creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
Hello,

Can this PR be closed as invalid? Reporter hasn't responded in over two months, and the problem most likely was in his own machine (caused by building in a non clean environment).

Also, the error causing editors/lazarus-lcl-units to fail was fixed in December (SVN rev. 337235), so there is little I can do with this PR.

Thanks!
